name: Pasta Carbonara Krbs41a
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil for the pasta.
2. In another large pot, cook the bacon over medium heat until browned.
3. Add garlic and stir once, then remove from heat.
4. Cook the pasta in boiling water, while beating together the eggs, Parmesan cheese, milk or heavy cream, and ground pepper.
5. The consistency of the egg mixture should be like wallpaper paste. You may need to add more milk or cheese as some cheese will absorb more liquid.
6. Once the bacon is cooked, return the pan to heat. Drain the pasta and add it to the pan with the bacon.
7. Toss well to combine.
8. Pour the egg, cheese mixture over the pasta and bacon.
9. Toss everything together. The heat from the bacon and pasta will cook the egg mixture into a creamy sauce.
10. Add more fresh ground pepper if desired.
11. Suggestions: For added flavor, include slivers of prosciutto or plain deli ham, and/or sauté thinly sliced mushrooms with the bacon.
